description: Spinner/progress on Out: out.spinner(), out.progress(), auto-disable on !isTTY, suppress in --json mode, testkit capture

tasks.title: [D1] Activity types — ActivityEvent, SpinnerHandle, ProgressHandle, options, Fallback; extend Out
tasks.description: Define all activity types (ActivityEvent DU, SpinnerHandle, ProgressHandle, SpinnerOptions, ProgressOptions, Fallback). Add spinner() and progress() to Out interface. Export from schema barrel and src/index.ts.

tasks.title: [D2] Noop + static handles — non-TTY implementations
tasks.description: Implement NoopSpinnerHandle, NoopProgressHandle, StaticSpinnerHandle, StaticProgressHandle. Static handles emit plain text via out.log()/out.error() at start and terminal events.

tasks.title: [D3] Capture handles + testkit wiring — ActivityEvent[] recording
tasks.description: CaptureSpinnerHandle and CaptureProgressHandle that record ActivityEvent[]. Extend CapturedOutput and RunResult with activity. Wire through createCaptureOutput() and runCommand().

tasks.title: [D4] TTY handles + ANSI rendering — spinner frames, progress bar, cursor control
tasks.description: TTYSpinnerHandle and TTYProgressHandle. Spinner frame animation (braille), progress bar rendering, \r overwrite, cursor show/hide. Timer management with setInterval.

tasks.title: [D5] OutputChannel integration — mode dispatch, active handle tracking, implicit stop
tasks.description: Implement spinner() and progress() on OutputChannel. Mode dispatch (TTY vs noop vs static). Active handle tracking + implicit stop on overlap.

tasks.title: [D6] Public API exports — new types from schema/index.ts and src/index.ts
tasks.description: Export ActivityEvent, SpinnerHandle, ProgressHandle, SpinnerOptions, ProgressOptions, Fallback from schema barrel and public API.

tasks.title: [D7] Tests — all modes, all handle types, testkit capture, wrap, overlap
tasks.description: Unit tests for each handle type. Integration tests via testkit. Coverage: TTY mode, non-TTY silent, non-TTY static fallback, jsonMode suppression, implicit stop on overlap, .wrap() success/failure, activity event capture, progress determinate/indeterminate.
